name: AIsa Twitter Post Engage
description: Requires python3, and AISA_API_KEY. Uses a configurable AIsa relay for Twitter/X research, OAuth-gated posting, and user-approved media uploads. Native-first ClawHub plugin for `aisa-twitter-post-engage`. Ships the packaged AIsa skill with an `openclaw.plugin.json` manifest and a Claude-compatible bundle fallback. Run Twitter/X post-launch follow-through through AIsa. Use when: the user already has a draft, launch tweet, or reply target and needs one skill to publish and then manage early interactions. Supports posting, reply context, and lightweight engagement.

AISA_API_KEY.title: Aisa Api Key
AISA_API_KEY.description: Provide AISA_API_KEY for the packaged AIsa skill runtime.

TWITTER_RELAY_BASE_URL.title: Twitter Relay Base Url
TWITTER_RELAY_BASE_URL.description: Optional override for the Twitter relay base URL. Defaults to https://api.aisa.one/apis/v1/twitter.

TWITTER_RELAY_TIMEOUT.title: Twitter Relay Timeout
TWITTER_RELAY_TIMEOUT.description: Optional timeout in seconds for Twitter relay requests.

notes: Uses a configurable AIsa relay for Twitter/X OAuth, research, posting, and engagement.
User-approved media uploads are sent to the configured relay.
